prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年约19299名→2022年约25640名→2023年约22574名→2024年约23366名→2025年约32426名。2021-2024年山西省为旧高考理科综合模式，2025年首次实施新高考物理类，批次由本科一批A段合并为本科批，导致位次口径发生系统性变化，2025年位次较2024年后移约9060名。2025年作为新高考首年基准位次约32426名；该校在山西省理科/物理类招生计划2021-2025年均为70人，2026年招生计划仍为70人，连续六年计划人数持平，无扩招或缩招信号，招生规模对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从2021年第94位持续上升至2026年第86位，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；声誉文件无广西大学负面记录，整体声誉平稳；抖音学校热度总排名第25位（较热），2023年单年排名第20位（高热），短视频平台曝光量较高，反映报考关注度处于中等偏上水平，对竞争有轻微加剧作用；第五轮学科评估中广西大学无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科不突出，对高分考生吸引力有限，整体报考以性价比为导向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在山西招生专业以电气类、电子信息类、机械类、土木类、化工类等工科为主。2026年专业热度数据显示：电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐但明显降温，土木建筑为分化观望，生化环材为一般观望。整体专业热度分化，工科热门专业竞争仍较激烈。山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），考生规模缩减有利于缓解竞争。2026年；广西大学位于广西南宁，距山西较远，属于跨省就读。广西大学作为华南地区综合性211，对山西考生而言地域吸引力一般，主要依靠211层次和性价比吸引考生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年新高考首年位次32426为基准；2026年招生计划持平，对竞争无直接影响；软科排名持续上升和抖音热度较热对报考热度有微弱正向作用；但山西省物理类考生减少约3.4%缓解了竞争压力。在，考虑考生减少和学校排名上升的综合影响，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移。预测最低位次约32126名，区间31626-32626名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约32126名，区间31626-32626名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力选择，一档专业作为冲刺（电气、电子信息等热门工科需位次明显优于区间上限），三档专业作为保底。广西大学无A类优势学科，专业选择上应优先考虑社会热度高、就业前景好的电气类、电子信息类，谨慎选择土木、化工、工商管理等热度下降或劝退专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 19,299th in 2021 → approximately 25,640th in 2022 → approximately 22,574th in 2023 → approximately 23,366th in 2024 → approximately 32,426th in 2025. From 2021 to 2024, Shanxi Province used the old Gaokao science comprehensive model; in 2025, the new Gaokao physics category was implemented for the first time, with batches merged from the first batch of undergraduate A segment into the undergraduate batch, causing a systematic change in ranking caliber. The 2025 ranking shifted backward by approximately 9,060 places compared to 2024. The baseline ranking for the first year of the new Gaokao in 2025 is approximately 32,426th. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Shanxi Province was 70 students from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 enrollment plan remains 70 students, with the plan unchanged for six consecutive years, indicating no expansion or contraction signals, and the enrollment scale has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a national Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and a slight increase in attractiveness to candidates. There are no negative records for Guangxi University in the reputation file, indicating overall stable reputation. The university's Douyin popularity total ranking is 25th (relatively hot), with a single-year ranking of 20th in 2023 (highly hot), indicating high exposure on short video platforms and moderate to high attention from applicants, which slightly intensifies competition. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Guangxi University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with no prominent advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates, and overall applications are driven by cost-effectiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Shanxi are mainly engineering fields such as Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Chemical Engineering. 2026 major popularity data shows: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended, Computer Science is recommended but significantly cooling, Civil Architecture is differentiated and wait-and-see, and Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials are generally wait-and-see. Overall, major popularity is differentiated, with competition still intense for popular engineering majors. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, which helps alleviate competition. Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, far from Shanxi, making it a cross-province study option. As a comprehensive 211 university in South China, its regional appeal to Shanxi candidates is average, mainly relying on its 211 level and cost-effectiveness to attract applicants.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the baseline ranking for the first year of the new Gaokao in 2025 is 32,426; the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, with no direct impact on competition; the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking and relatively hot Douyin popularity have a slight positive effect on application enthusiasm; however, the 3.4% decrease in physics category candidates in Shanxi Province alleviates competitive pressure. Taking into account the combined effects of the decrease in candidates and the rise in university ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32,126th, with a range of 31,626 to 32,626th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 32,126th, range 31,626-32,626th. Candidates within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a sprint (popular engineering fields like Electrical Engineering and Electronic Information require a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Guangxi University has no Class A advantageous disciplines; when choosing majors, priority should be given to those with high social popularity and good employment prospects, such as Electrical Engineering and Electronic Information, while cautiously selecting majors like Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, and Business Administration, which are cooling down or discouraged.
